completed_tasks.name: Deploy final config, confirm parity, and start the 24h soak

remaining_tasks.name: Run the 24h analysis, compare against baseline, and decide whether to re-enable the autotuner

blockers.description: Phase 164 is waiting for the real T+24h checkpoint at 2026-04-11 19:49:48 CDT
blockers.workaround: Earlier spot checks are allowed, but formal completion must wait for the uninterrupted 24h window.

human_actions_pending.action: Resume at or after 2026-04-11 19:49:48 CDT and run the Phase 164 24h analysis/approval gate
human_actions_pending.context: This is the formal VALID-01 checkpoint for the confirmation soak.

decisions.decision: Use the existing 2026-04-10 19:49:48 CDT service restart as the Phase 164 soak start instead of forcing another restart
decisions.rationale: Production config parity with git was already proven, so another restart would only reset the observation window.

decisions.decision: Keep the shared metrics.db topology after Phase 165 measurement instead of planning a split-db migration
decisions.rationale: Live contention telemetry did not show sustained lock pressure after the retention and maintenance fixes.

decisions.decision: Plan burst-detection follow-up work as Phase 166 rather than mixing it into the active soak phase
decisions.rationale: The tcp_12down p99 spike work is a post-soak tuning change and should not contaminate the 24h validation window.

next_action: Wait for the T+24h checkpoint, inspect any earlier spot-check output if available, then execute Phase 164 Plan 02 and record the VALID-01 decision.
context_notes: Phase 164 is the active milestone gate. A background T+1h spot-check is queued (PID 1688496) and should write to /tmp/phase164-t1-spotcheck.log around 2026-04-10 20:49:48 CDT. Phase 166 is fully planned but must stay parked until the soak decision is complete.
